center.name: 下幾內亞森林
center.summary: 下幾內亞森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Congo serpent eagle，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: batesi is found in lower Guinean forests from southern Cameroon through Gabon and western Uganda. Its range covers . The species lives in dense primary forest below in elevation in the dark understory. As it is adapted for dense forest, it is not well-adapted for secondary forests and plantations. The Congo serpent eagle does not migrate, though it is unknown if it is locally nomadic
